name: Bu Ram Pram Pra
original_name: บุรำปรัมปรา
overview: A mysterious child, dressed exactly as described in the epic Phra Aphai Mani, appears in the arms of Saensamut - unconscious but tightly gripping a strange staff - unraveling a fantastical tale that blurs myth and reality.

trailers.title: บุรำปรัมปรา | เร็วๆ นี้
